meaning: vt.閲嶉摵璺潰vi.閲嶆柊闇查潰
examples: Meanwhile the race is on to resurface the road before next Wednesday.
It is likely that they would go into hiding for a few weeks, and resurface when the publicity died down.
His bad habits began to resurface.
As rumors of a Facebook smartphone resurface, Zuckerberg risks reacting to two interrelated forces.
After jail, Anderson didn't resurface until a May 2005 annual report from pipsqueak NuWay Medical.
